headline: I connect great people <​> companies / 4x unicorn exec
current_position_description:
Alongside Whispered, I advise:
► COMPANIES:  I help accelerate select breakout companies
► EXECS: I work closely with a few top GTM execs at breakout companies to accelerate their careers and their companies
► INVESTORS: I collaborate with top investors to identify breakout companies

I love learning new spaces but a few I deeply know include:
► HR tech (worked in it for 7 years at Upwork + Culture Amp + now Whispered)   
► GTM Tech (I am on speed-dial with many GTM tech CEOs)
► Data (I believe data will rewire all of GTM and am passionate about this change)
► AI (I advise a number of AI companies and am building deep in it with Whispered)
► PLG (I know how to operationalize data to drive enterprise sales)

A few select companies / firms I've been involved with include:
► Spiff: Commission automation (sold to Salesforce)
► MadKudu: Lead scoring and signals (sold to HG Insights)
► Sendoso: #1 gifting platform
► Scratchpad: Changing UX for Salesforce
► Cabal: Helps founders leverage their networks
► Sweep: Customize and scale Salesforce configuration
► Front: Email support and collaboration
► Gong: Call insights and forecasting
► Outreach:  SDR sequencing
► MOPros: Ccommunity site for marketing operations
► ProService: Largest PEO in Hawaii.  Invested at initial acquisition for 50x return
► TestBox: Best demo software 
► Boostup:  Forecasting and pipeline acceleration
► Stack Moxie: No-Code Monitoring for GTM Tech Stacks
► Ampersand:  Deep integrations platform for developers
► Coffee:  CRM 2.0 attacking the enterprise
► Inflection.io:  Marketing automation on top of the data warehouse
► Fullcast:  Driving a revolution in software for RevOps
► Sonar: The first tool for sales ops!
► Bitly: 1 million link signups a month
► The Swarm:  Relationship mapping API powering connections
► GTM Fund: Investing alongside 250+ other GTM leaders

Please don’t cold outreach me on investing - I'm currently only investing through funds I have stakes in.
investor_title:
I have spent my career building sales and marketing engines for world-beating companies (Upwork, Box, Culture Amp). My teams have sent 1 billion+ emails and caused a lot of pain!

Like pretty much everyone, I have also been overwhelmed by email.

So I built Gated to fix email for both buyers AND sellers.... and to do some good for the world.

Gated allows you to focus on the emails that matter.

Want to reach me (and donate to my charity)? drop me a line at andy@gated.com. Yes with
Gated I’m comfortable putting my email on the internet!!!

Outside of work, I advise growing SaaS companies and am also passionate about:
► Advising early-career folks on their career (returning the favor others did for me)
► Adventure (on pause like probably everyone with COVID;)
► Spending time with my family

positionList.title: Co-founder and CEO
positionList.description:
Backed by 50 GTM leaders and top VCs, we took a big swing to rewire email to give people back control over their attention.  We built the "noise cancelling headphones" for email and filtered over 2 Billions emails.

We drove a 20x increase in reply rates for senders and sanity for users.

Unfortunately the market on the user side was more niche than anticipated so we wrapped up and open-sourced our code to ensure the mission continues.

positionList.title: Vice President Revenue Operations & Growth Marketing
positionList.description: In addition to Revenue Operations (where I had hired/grew great leaders), I took over the Demand Generation team!   This team ran pipeline growth, campaigns, SEO, content, field marketing, web, design, community and digital marketing

positionList.title: Vice President of Revenue Operations
positionList.description:
Working with all GTM functions, my team of ~25 people drove 10x ARR growth (to a🦄) 

I hired and grew great leaders across:
▸Sales Operations
▸Marketing Operations
▸Customer Success Operations
▸GTM systems
▸GTM Data

positionList.title: Sr. Director: Customer Success Operations
positionList.description: Created and scaled customer success operations team to drive operational improvements for all post-sale services across $400 million of revenue and team of 220 global employees

positionList.title: Sr. Director: Marketing Operations
positionList.description: Led Marketing Operations team (concurrent with Customer Success Operations role) during key transition point for Box’s marketing team

positionList.title: Vice President of Revenue Operations
positionList.description: As a member of the senior management team at Elance (merged with oDesk), drove operations and initiatives to double annual billings to $500 million

positionList.title: Vice President of Revenue Operations
positionList.description:
(left to found Whispered)
Led 60 person team driving GTM systems, data, strategy and enablement for >$400m ARR.  

Teams included
► Marketing Operations (MOPS)
► Sales Operations (SOPS)
► Customer Success Operations (CSOPS)
► Enablement
► GTM Strategy and Analytics
► Customer Marketing (interim)
► Pricing (interim)
► Paid Marketing (interim)
► GTM Systems

positionList.title: Chief Operating Officer
positionList.description: Built one of the leading administrative assistant outsourcing companies with operations in Latin America and Asia.

positionList.title: Operating Executive
positionList.description: Led the firm’s efforts in the HR technology sector while searching for a business to buy and run

positionList.title: Vice President
positionList.description: Led the development of VillaSport from concept to execution, scaling the company quickly from $0 to $40 million in revenue.

positionList.title: Founder
positionList.description: Whispered's platform helps top executives collaborate on insights, introductions, unposted roles and support to find their next role and build their career.
